english translation text:
In the Name of Allah, the All-beneficent, the All-merciful.
Al Balad – The City

I swear by this town,
Al Balad – The City

as you reside in this town;
Al Balad – The City

[and] by the father and him whom he begot:
Al Balad – The City

certainly We created man in travail.
Al Balad – The City

arabic text: أَيَحْسَبُ أَن لَّن يَقْدِرَ عَلَيْهِ أَحَدٌ
english translation text:
Does he suppose that no one will ever have power over him?
Al Balad – The City

He says, ‘I have squandered immense wealth.’
Al Balad – The City

Does he suppose that no one sees him?
Al Balad – The City

Have We not made for him two eyes,
Al Balad – The City

a tongue, and two lips,
Al Balad – The City

and shown him the two paths [of good and evil]?
Al Balad – The City

Yet he has not embarked upon the uphill task.
Al Balad – The City

And what will show you what is the uphill task?
Al Balad – The City

[It is] the freeing of a slave,
Al Balad – The City

arabic text: أَوْ إِطْعَامٌ فِي يَوْمٍ ذِي مَسْغَبَةٍ
english translation text:
or feeding, during days of [general] starvation,
Al Balad – The City

an orphan among relatives
Al Balad – The City

or a needy man in desolation,
Al Balad – The City

arabic text: ثُمَّ كَانَ مِنَ الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالصَّبْرِ وَتَوَاصَوْا بِالْمَرْحَمَةِ
english translation text:
while being one of those who have faith and enjoin one another to patience, and enjoin one another to compassion.
Al Balad – The City

They are the People of the Right Hand.
Al Balad – The City

arabic text: وَالَّذِينَ كَفَرُوا بِآيَاتِنَا هُمْ أَصْحَابُ الْمَشْأَمَةِ
english translation text:
But those who defy Our signs, they are the People of the Left Hand.
Al Balad – The City

A closed Fire will be [imposed] upon them.
Al Balad – The City
